description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 17 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 23 mins. His WakaTime activity was spread across 4 projects and was mostly in Python, TypeScript, Markdown, and SQL. He did not make any recorded GitHub commits, open any pull requests, or create any new repositories.
